PREFIX ps: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/statement/>
PREFIX p: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/>
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX pq: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/qualifier/>
SELECT ?player ?playerLabel ?goals WHERE {
  wd:Q83459 p:P710 ?participantStatement .
  ?participantStatement ps:P710 ?player .
  ?player p:P2866 ?goalsStatement .
  ?goalsStatement ps:P2866 ?goals .
  ?goalsStatement pq:P1712 wd:Q83459 .
  OPTIONAL {
    ?player rdfs:label ?playerLabel
    FILTER(LANG(?playerLabel) = "en")
  }
}
ORDER BY DESC(?goals)
LIMIT 1
